prompt: A cinematic dark-anime crossover poster titled {argument name="title text" default="DARK LEGENDS"}, showing 4 iconic male antihero figures standing in a ruined gothic nightmare city at night beneath an enormous blood-red full moon. The composition is a wide dramatic group shot with the characters lined up across the foreground, each facing a slightly different direction with confident, ominous body language. On the far left, 1 soldier-like young man with short dark hair wears a dark green hooded military cloak billowing in the wind, visible tactical harness straps and gear around his waist, and holds 2 steel blades pointed downward; a winged insignia is visible on the back of his cloak. In the center-left, 1 tall white-haired man with spiky hair wears a sleek high-collar black outfit and stands casually with one hand in his pocket, looking dominant and calm. In the center-right, 1 slim brown-haired young man in a wrinkled white button-up shirt holds 1 black notebook close to his chest with the visible cover text “Death Note,” posing with quiet intelligence. On the far right, 1 pale white-haired ghoul-like young man wears torn dark clothing; one glowing red eye is visible and monstrous red-black fleshy tendrils coil outward behind and beside him in 2 large swirling masses. The background is filled with towering ruined cathedral spires and shattered gothic skyscrapers, with many windows glowing crimson from within. The sky is stormy, cloud-choked, and nearly black, lit by the giant red moon centered high behind the group, creating a backlit halo effect and strong rim lighting. Use a dark palette of black, charcoal, deep crimson, and muted steel gray, with high contrast, gritty textures, subtle bloodlike embers, and a hyper-detailed illustrated anime style. Add distressed epic serif typography across the bottom spelling {argument name="headline text" default="DARK LEGENDS"} in huge cracked stone-like letters with red glow and weathered texture. The overall feeling is apocalyptic, stylish, menacing, and mythic, like a premium movie or game crossover key art.
translatedPrompt: 一张电影级的暗黑动漫跨界海报，标题为 {argument name="title text" default="DARK LEGENDS"}，展示了 4 位标志性的男性反英雄角色，他们站在夜晚一座哥特式噩梦般的废墟城市中，头顶是一轮巨大的血红色满月。构图为宽幅的戏剧性群像，角色们在前景一字排开，每个人朝向略有不同，展现出自信且不祥的肢体语言。最左侧是一位留着深色短发的年轻士兵，身穿随风飘动的深绿色连帽军用斗篷，腰间可见战术背带和装备，手持两把向下指的钢刃；斗篷背面可见带翅膀的徽章。中左侧是一位身材高大的白发男子，留着尖刺状发型，身穿干练的高领黑色服装，单手插兜，神情从容且充满统治力。中右侧是一位身材苗条、棕色头发的年轻人，身穿褶皱的白色衬衫，将一本封面印有“Death Note”字样的黑色笔记本紧贴胸前，姿态展现出沉静的智慧。最右侧是一位脸色苍白的白发食尸鬼般的年轻人，身穿破损的深色服装；露出一只发光的红眼，身后和身侧盘绕着两团巨大的、怪异的红黑色肉质触须。背景中矗立着高耸的废墟大教堂尖顶和破碎的哥特式摩天大楼，许多窗户透出深红色的光芒。天空阴云密布，几乎全黑，被高悬在群体后方中央的巨大红月照亮，营造出背光光环效果和强烈的轮廓光。采用黑色、炭灰色、深绯红和柔和钢灰色的暗色调，具有高对比度、粗粝的质感、细微的血色余烬，以及超精细的插画动漫风格。在底部添加磨损的史诗衬线字体，拼写出 {argument name="headline text" default="DARK LEGENDS"}，字体呈现巨大的裂纹石质感，带有红色光晕和风化纹理。整体氛围呈现出末日感、时尚感、威胁感和神话感，如同高端电影或游戏跨界的主视觉图。

breakdown.creativeCore: 暗黑动漫传奇海报：一张极具戏剧性的哥特式跨界风格动漫海报，描绘了四位暗黑男性角色在血月下的废墟城市中，非常适合用于电影级主视觉图或宣传海报生成。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 电影海报、音乐封面、书籍封面、播客封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: cinematic, anime, premium]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: rim light, high contrast]。

Text requirements:
文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
